mention.example: She mentioned that she was moving.
There was no mention of the problem.

message.example: I left a message on his phone.

metal.example: The spoon is made of metal.
He sat on a metal chair.

meter.example: The room is four meters wide.
The taxi meter showed two hundred dollars.
meter.example_zh: 計程車的計費表顯示兩百元。

method.example: This is a good method for learning words.

mile.example: The town is five miles away.

military.example: He served in the military for two years.
The base is a military area.

minor.example: It was only a minor injury.
Minors are not allowed to buy it.

minority.example: Only a minority of students agreed.
The school welcomes students from minorities.
minority.example_zh: 學校歡迎少數族群的學生。

mirror.example: She looked at herself in the mirror.

mix.example: Mix the flour with the water.
The class is a mix of boys and girls.

mixture.example: The drink is a mixture of fruit juices.
mixture.example_zh: 這飲料是各種果汁的混合。

model.example: She works as a fashion model.
model.example_zh: 她從事時裝模特兒的工作。

mood.example: She is in a good mood today.

mop.example: He used a mop to clean the floor.

motion.example: The motion of the boat made me dizzy.
He made a motion with his hand.

motorcycle.example: He rides a motorcycle to work.

mug.example: She drank coffee from a big mug.
mug.example_zh: 她用一個大馬克杯喝咖啡。

musical.example: We watched a musical on stage.
musical.example_zh: 我們看了一齣舞台音樂劇。

musical.example: She comes from a musical family.
musical.example_zh: 她來自一個有音樂天分的家庭。

musician.example: The musician played the guitar well.
musician.example_zh: 那位音樂家吉他彈得很好。

nail.example: He hammered a nail into the wall.

narrow.example: The path is too narrow for a car.
narrow.example_zh: 這條路太窄，車子過不去。

nation.example: The whole nation watched the game.
nation.example_zh: 全國人民都看了這場比賽。

natural.example_zh: 我們應該保護自然資源。

natural.example: She has a natural talent for music.

naughty.example: The naughty boy broke the window.
naughty.example_zh: 那個頑皮的男孩打破了窗戶。

nearby.example: We went to a nearby store.
nearby.example_zh: 我們去了附近的一家商店。

nearly.example: It is nearly time for lunch.

needle.example: She sewed the button with a needle.

negative.example: Try not to have negative thoughts.

neighbor.example: Our neighbor is kind and friendly.
neighbor.example_zh: 我們的鄰居既親切又友善。

neither.example: Neither of them came to the party.
I don't like it, and neither does she.

nephew.example: My nephew is five years old.

nerve.example: The nerve in his tooth was damaged.
It took nerve to speak in front of everyone.
nerve.example_zh: 在眾人面前說話需要勇氣。

nervous.example: She felt nervous before the speech.

network.example: The phone has no network signal here.
network.example_zh: 這裡手機沒有網路訊號。

niece.example: My niece loves to draw pictures.

nod.example: She nodded to show she agreed.
He gave a nod and left.

none.example: None of the answers are correct.

noodle.example: I had a bowl of beef noodles.

nor.example: He likes neither tea nor coffee.

northern.example: It snows a lot in the northern part.

notebook.example: I write my notes in a notebook.
notebook.example_zh: 我把筆記寫在筆記本上。

novel.example: She is reading a long novel.
novel.example_zh: 她正在讀一本長篇小說。

nut.example: Tighten the nut with a wrench.

object.example_zh: 那個奇怪的東西是什麼？

object.example: She objected to the new rule.

obvious.example: It was obvious that he was tired.

occur.example: Accidents often occur on this road.
A good idea occurred to me.
occur.example_zh: 我突然想到一個好主意。

offer.example: She offered me a cup of tea.
They made me a good offer.
offer.example_zh: 他們給了我一個好的條件。

official.example: This is the official website of the school.
A government official gave a speech.
official.example_zh: 一位政府官員發表了演說。

operate.example: Do you know how to operate this machine?
operate.example_zh: 你知道怎麼操作這台機器嗎？

operate.example: The doctors operated on his heart.
operate.example_zh: 醫生替他的心臟動了手術。

opinion.example: In my opinion, the movie was great.

ordinary.example: It was just an ordinary day.

organ.example: The heart is an important organ.
She played the organ in church.

organization.example: She works for a charity organization.
organization.example_zh: 她在一個慈善機構工作。
